objective: Establish a reproducible candidate-only versus no-candidate/no-ambient-Skill isolation method on one synthetic fixture without changing the user's installed global Skill.

fixed_controls.prompt: $goal-draft-policy Review PROBE.md as a human-reviewable Goal draft and stop before activation. Keep the final response under 120 words.

candidate_required: JSONL command_execution reads the repository candidate SKILL.md path
the fixed non-semantic marker is present in the structured trace
no Skill path outside the container repository candidate path is read
baseline_required: no goal-draft-policy SKILL.md read appears in JSONL
the fixed marker is absent from trace and final output
the host user profile is not among container mounts

condition_delta.candidate: Copy the committed candidate Skill into /workspace/.agents/skills/goal-draft-policy and append only the fixed HTML-comment witness.

hypotheses.claim: A pinned container with an empty HOME and no host-profile mount isolates the repository candidate from the user's ambient global Skill.
If H1 cleanly fails, launching from a nested CWD tests the documented repository-root ancestor scan without changing any other isolation boundary.

decision_gate.adopt: Fresh post-contract-commit pair has candidate witness PASS, baseline absence PASS, condition parity PASS, and published manifest/result/hash validation PASS.
decision_gate.reject: Both cells complete normally but one or more mechanical isolation gates fail.
decision_gate.inconclusive: Container, package installation, authentication, provider, or structured-event availability prevents a normal paired observation within the maximum trials.

public_authority.cleanup: Remove only verified per-run auth/profile directories beneath .eval-work after hashing.

prohibited: modification of user global Skills or global configuration
reinterpretation or deletion of R-002 through R-007
